prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含2021–2023理科、2024–2025物理类）最低位次依次约2060→2004→2374→2306→2598名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约594名；2025年基准约2598名；该校在贵州省理科组计划：2021年39人、2022年39人、2023年38人、2024年28人（物理类）、2025年32人（物理类）；2026年计划41人，较2025年扩招约28.1%，扩招幅度较大，理论上会推高位次数字（竞争加剧）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第20名，稳居全国Top20，近年排名稳定（2021年第22→2026年第20），属于顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（涉及学校管理回应与师德师风事件），但整体影响有限；抖音热度排名第66（一般），短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未见明显报考关注升温信号；2025年声誉评价为中性/混合；历史无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估A-及以上达20个：化学工程与技术A+、管理科学与工程A+、仪器科学与技术A、光学工程A、动力工程及工程热物理A、土木工程A、城乡规划学A、建筑学A、机械工程A、水利工程A等，工科实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工科试验班（智能与计算类、电气信息类）等热门专业社会热度较高；贵州省2026年考生总人数约29.9万，较2025年（物理类+历史类约29.7万）略有增加；天津大学位于天津市（非本省），2025年在贵州省招生占比约1.5%，属跨省招生；无显著地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年扩招约28.1%带来的竞争加剧效应、学校顶尖层次对考生的持续吸引力，以及本省考生总数略有增加，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准2598名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约3036名，区间2690–3382名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Science Group (including Science from 2021-2023 and Physics Category from 2024-2025) were approximately 2060 → 2004 → 2374 → 2306 → 2598, showing a fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 594 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2598; the university's enrollment plan in Guizhou Province for the Science Group: 39 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 28 in 2024 (Physics Category), 32 in 2025 (Physics Category); the 2026 plan is 41, an increase of about 28.1% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which theoretically will push the ranking numbers higher (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 20th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national Top 20, with stable rankings in recent years (22nd in 2021 → 20th in 2026), belonging to top engineering powerhouses; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents), but the overall impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 66th (average), short video exposure is at a medium level, with no obvious signs of increased application attention; the 2025 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; no history of admission gaps; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 20 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Instrument Science and Technology A, Optical Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A, Civil Engineering A, Urban and Rural Planning A, Architecture A, Mechanical Engineering A, Water Conservancy Engineering A, etc., with extremely outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligence and Computing, Electrical and Information) have high social popularity; the total number of candidates in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (Physics Category + History Category about 297,000); Tianjin University is located in Tianjin (not in the province), with enrollment in Guizhou Province accounting for about 1.5% in 2025, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment; no significant regional preference shift.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the increased competition effect from the 2026 expansion of about 28.1%, the continuous attraction of the school's top level to candidates, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 2598; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3036, with a range of 2690–3382.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Electrical and Information)
- Engineering Experimental Class (National Future Technology College).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2690–3382, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes, with Tier 1 Intelligence and Computing/Electrical and Information/Future Technology College as reach options (requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 Civil Engineering/Chemical Engineering/Architecture as safety options; rankings better than 2690 can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
